title: Perform offal Meat Hygiene Assessment
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform offal Meat Hygiene Assessment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Receive work instructions and clarify where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Receive work instructions and clarify where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Receive work instructions and clarify where required.

pcs.text: Identify health, safety and food safety hazards for task, and control associated risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health, safety and food safety hazards for task, and control associated risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health, safety and food safety hazards for task, and control associated risks.

pcs.text: Wear appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and clothing, and ensure correct fit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Wear appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and clothing, and ensure correct fit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Wear appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and clothing, and ensure correct fit.

pcs.text: Identify approved sampling plan for sample size and frequency
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify approved sampling plan for sample size and frequency?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify approved sampling plan for sample size and frequency.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Monitor offal

pcs.text: Select samples for assessment according to the approved sampling plan for sample size and frequency
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select samples for assessment according to the approved sampling plan for sample size and frequency?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select samples for assessment according to the approved sampling plan for sample size and frequency.

pcs.text: Conduct assessment utilising appropriate facilities, lighting and time according to workplace health and safety standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct assessment utilising appropriate facilities, lighting and time according to workplace health and safety standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct assessment utilising appropriate facilities, lighting and time according to workplace health and safety standards.

pcs.text: Conduct assessment according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct assessment according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct assessment according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor offal for defects according to agreed criteria and classification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor offal for defects according to agreed criteria and classification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor offal for defects according to agreed criteria and classification.

pcs.text: Record defects accurately using the correct forms or electronic system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record defects accurately using the correct forms or electronic system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record defects accurately using the correct forms or electronic system.

pcs.text: Identify levels for triggering corrective actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify levels for triggering corrective actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify levels for triggering corrective actions.

pcs.text: Implement immediate corrective action according to the Meat Hygiene Assessment (MHA) program's requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement immediate corrective action according to the Meat Hygiene Assessment (MHA) program's requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement immediate corrective action according to the Meat Hygiene Assessment (MHA) program's requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor offal according to the workplace requirements for hygiene and sanitation, and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor offal according to the workplace requirements for hygiene and sanitation, and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor offal according to the workplace requirements for hygiene and sanitation, and regulatory requirements.
